---
name: Usage help
about: Ask for help with local setup, SDK usage, examples, or MCP integration.
title: "[Help]: "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

Use this for public, non-sensitive DevKit questions. For private environment details or production incidents, use the support link instead of opening a public issue.

## Area

Choose one:

- DevKit local runtime
- Python SDK
- TypeScript SDK
- Go SDK
- MCP server or governing proxy
- Workload identity
- Policy or audit flow
- Not sure

## What Are You Trying To Do?

Describe the outcome you want, not only the command that failed.

## What Have You Tried?

Include commands, docs pages, examples, or SDK calls you already used.

## Non-Sensitive Context

Include OS, package versions, local runtime state, or sanitized errors if relevant.

## Public Issue Safety Check

- [ ] I have removed secrets, tokens, customer data, private URLs, and sensitive logs from this issue.
